category.name: Fried Rice
category.special_instructions: Substituting white rice with brown rice will be $1.50 for a pint and $2.50 for a quart.

menu_items.name: Vegetable Fried Rice
menu_items.description: Wok-fried rice with fresh seasonal vegetables and egg.

menu_items.name: Chicken Fried Rice
menu_items.description: Classic fried rice with tender chicken, egg, and scallions.

menu_items.name: Beef Fried Rice
menu_items.description: Wok-fried rice with sliced beef, egg, and scallions.

menu_items.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
menu_items.description: Fried rice with plump shrimp, egg, and fresh scallions.

menu_items.name: House Special Fried Rice
menu_items.description: A combination of chicken, beef, shrimp, and BBQ pork with egg and vegetables.
